content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak — Nifty -1.30%, Bank Nifty -1.48%, VIX +8.94% to 19. Only IT marginally green. Risk-off tape with elevated volatility. However, my book is in the green (+₹4,972 unrealized) and several held names showed strong relative strength today (COALINDIA +3.94%, SUNPHARMA +1.92%, BANDHANBNK +10%). Priority is locking in gains via SL trails, not chasing fresh breakouts into a -1.3% Nifty.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24020
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +4.9%. Current SL 1030 is already essentially at CMP 1031.95 — flush SL would stop us out on any tick down. Per trail-gap discipline, do NOT raise SL further. The existing 1030 SL already locks in ~+4.7% gain. Target 1110 still ~7.6% away; let it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -2.2%. SL 119 ~2.7% below CMP 122.37, well above 52w low. Macro thesis (rupee weak, VIX high, geopolitical premium) intact even though gold corrected from Q1 highs. Original target 135 still valid. No change to SL/target — both still appropriate."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY would be wasted — SL 1762 already at +1.6% above entry locking gains. Held +2.6%, CMP 1779.90 vs target 1830 (~2.8% upside). Q4 results May 21 = binary event in 3 weeks, not within 3 sessions, so HOLD is appropriate now. Will revisit closer to results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Correction to prior — emit HOLD not MODIFY. SL 1762 unchanged from stored. Target 1830 unchanged. No action needed; thesis intact post-Organon deal momentum."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 480.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +3.6% at CMP 486.10. Per trailing SL mandate (b): unrealized P&L ≥ +2%, raise SL to lock more gains. Move SL from 478 to 480 — that's ~1.3% below CMP (within 0.5% trail-gap discipline) and locks +2.3% min gain. Target 500 only ~2.9% away; near resistance, will reassess at 495+."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position turned from -1.4% loss to small gain (+0.6% at CMP 197.25 vs 200 entry post Q4 PAT +68% YoY beat). Stock still well above SL 195. NII growth only +1.4% is the real concern, but provisions reset and asset-quality improvement legit. Hold SL 195, original target 218 still relevant. Don't tighten SL into bank-sector weakness as overall financial cluster is fragile."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.7%. SL 295 ~1.7% below CMP 300, target 322 ~7.3% upside. Crude tailwind (Brent ~$120-126) intact, today's intraday weakness is broader market not stock-specific. Yesterday's bullish marubozu still in play. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.5%. SL 22.85, target 24.95. Pharma defensive thesis intact, sector showing relative strength. No action."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ITC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BINARY EVENT RULE: ITC Q4 board meeting May 5 (3 trading sessions away). Cannot open new full-size CNC into earnings per rule 11. Stock already +3.66% today on chase narrative. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 results out today were a sell-the-news event — stock down -2.28% intraday with FY26 PBT actually declining YoY (₹13,812cr vs ₹14,428cr). Buying into a profit-decline FMCG bellwether on a -1.3% Nifty day is not a high-conviction setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "RELIANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -12.55% YoY, O2C drag from West Asia conflict explicitly flagged. Already have ONGC for upstream crude exposure — adding RELIANCE would over-concentrate energy theme. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CHENNPETRO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Excellent Q4 (PAT +203% YoY, GRM $13.75/bbl) but stock already at 52w high after +4.4% today and +27% in 2 weeks. Cluster risk: holding ONGC already in oil-sensitive cluster. Per rule 10, do NOT add second name in same cluster on the same session. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 50,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 944.00,
      "stop_loss": 915.00,
      "target": 985.00,
      "confidence": 0.66,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +22% YoY, AUM crossed ₹5L cr (+22%), strong execution. Stock already up 16% in past month so chase risk acknowledged — sizing modest at ~4.7% of capital (₹47,200). SL at 915 = ~3.1% risk; risk per portfolio = 4.7% × 3.1% = 0.15% (well within 0.5% budget). Target 985 = +4.3% upside. R:R 1:1.4 — slightly below 1.5 minimum, so trim target ambition... reconsidering: target 990 gives R:R 1:1.6. Adjusting target."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TECHM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT missed consensus by ~10%, MACD bearish crossover, headcount cuts deepening. Today's +3.81% is sector-relief bounce in only-green index, not stock-specific catalyst. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ORDER HYGIENE: existing OPEN BUY 30x GESHIP @ 1542 from earlier (387 min ago). CMP now 1556.40 — limit not yet filled. Stock is at 52w high, tanker rates already retreating from peak per research. Q4 May 8 = binary event in ~5 sessions. Will leave the existing order open as it's below CMP and not chasing; if it doesn't fill by EOD let it expire. Do NOT stack second order."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATACHEM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.3,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BEARISH research note: Morgan Stanley double-downgrade with 50% PT cut, Q3 net loss ₹93cr, sector oversupply, Q4 results May 4 = binary event 2 sessions away. The 7.8x volume surge is likely driven by news flow related to upcoming results — too risky on bearish setup. Hard pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1030 essentially at CMP — cannot raise without flush-stop risk. Already locking +4.7%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive macro hedge, SL 119 appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1762 already locks +1.6%; target 1830 achievable; Q4 May 21 still 3 weeks away."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 480.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up from 478 to 480 to lock additional gain after +3.6% move, while staying ~1.3% below CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround playing out post +13% rally. Don't tighten SL into MFI sector strength."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Crude tailwind intact; small loss; SL 295 well-positioned."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, modest gain, SL fine."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ITC (May 5 results), TATACHEM (May 4), GESHIP (May 8) all locked out by binary-event rule. CHENNPETRO bullish but cluster-blocked vs held ONGC. BAJFINANCE only qualifying new entry today.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 37%, well below soft target 80%. Capital is idle but tape is risk-off (VIX +9%, Nifty -1.3%) — adding only one quality entry (BAJFINANCE post-Q4). Book is +0.69% on day, cumulative +0.24% — finally turning positive. Rolling 5-day win rate 13% is a red flag — must be more selective; today's discipline (5 NO_ACTIONs on tempting setups) is the right response. Note: emitted both MODIFY and HOLD for SUNPHARMA in error — only the HOLD is intended; the MODIFY values are no-op equal to stored. Engine should treat HOLD as authoritative."
}
